name: Parkinson's Disease
definition: A neurodegenerative disease mainly characterized by movement disorders
etiology: Dopaminergic neuron degeneration and death, genetic factors, environmental toxins, oxidative stress
symptoms: Resting tremor, muscle rigidity, bradykinesia, abnormal gait and posture
treatment_principles: Dopamine replacement therapy, dopamine receptor agonists, anticholinergic drugs, deep brain stimulation
prevention_advice: Avoid environmental toxins, moderate exercise, maintain mental health, early diagnosis and treatment
